# Security Policy

This repository is a personal collection of project templates. The templates themselves
do not contain executable code, secrets, or dependencies that would typically constitute
a security vulnerability.

If you believe you've found a genuine security issue, please do not open a public issue.
Instead, use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/scottoffen/blueprints/security/advisories/new)
to report it privately.

I'll respond when I can, but make no guarantees about response time.
